observations.title: commitScopedPaths も pathspec なし commit を使用（スコープ外）
observations.rationale: 並列 round coordinator の commitScopedPaths（line 447）も git commit -m commitMessage（pathspec なし）を使用しており、理論的に同一の index 混入問題を持つ。ただし request で明示的にスコープ外とされており（partitionRoundChanges による変更セット制限が異なる文脈での防衛となっている）、独立した確認が必要。本 request の実装完了後に同欠陥の有無を個別確認すると良い。

toolResult.reason:
Wrote design.md, spec.md, tasks.md under specrunner/changes/write-scope-bypass-closure/ on branch change/write-scope-bypass-closure-be8366eb.

Design thesis (D1): extend the write-scope enforcement surface from "worktree diff" to "the full effect of the step (worktree + index + self-commit)", closing the 3 confirmed bypass routes at the same commit boundary.

Key decisions:
- D2 self-commit inspection: enumerate headBeforeStep..HEAD, apply per-mode rule (scoped: changed − declared − managed; guarded: findWriteScopeViolations), violation → quarantine committed diff + NO push + WRITE_SCOPE_VIOLATION halt; keep local commit (no git reset). Fail-closed on enumeration error.
- D3 index-contamination block: scoped commit uses `git commit -- <declared+managed>` (partial-commit records worktree content of listed paths only), staged-detection scoped to same pathspec; guarded keeps whole-index; explicit no-fallback for empty scoped pathspec.
- D4 scoped residual halt: throw after quarantine+restore instead of continue (relies on verified invariant: finalizeStepArtifacts runs before deriveStepCompletion, so halt suppresses result adoption).
- D5 add findScopedCommitViolations to write-scope.ts leaf (managedPaths injected). D6 generalize quarantine to a diff range. D7 pass scope context to shared tail.

Verified against current code (not just the attested list): executor ordering (executor.ts:438-461 vs 483), makeCommitFailHalt preserving err.code (step-halt.ts:305-316), commitFinalState no-op-on-clean, local.ts diffPathsBetweenCommits shape, and the real-git test harness (makeRealGitNoPushSpawnFn in test-materialize-boundary.test.ts) referenced for T-10 destructive confirmation.

spec.md: 5 Requirements with Given/When/Then scenarios covering all acceptance criteria. tasks.md: T-01..T-11 (write-scope fn, quarantine range, range helper, scoped pathspec, self-commit check, residual halt, docstrings, updated existing tests TC-023/quarantine-03, new mock unit tests, real-git integration/破壊確認, verification). Code edits deferred to implementer as instructed.
